tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: 21923 Calibration not accepted: Calibration not allowed in safe mode

abstract.p: Calibration not accepted: Calibration not allowed in safe mode.
The roll for which the calibration was requested needs safe mode, but calibration is not allowed in safe mode. The calibration request is not accepted.

note.p: This error is not shown in the error history. It is only shown in the tab "OverallResult" of SDS tests 04-6-026 and 21-6-003 together with a 'Test failed'.
